description: Grounded narrative faithfulness eval corpus. Each fixture is built by snapshotNarrative over seeded source records into a frozen manifest, composed into a grounded execution envelope, and scored against validateNarrativeGrounding. Answer keys are grounded in the frozen manifests, never hand-fabricated. The ten R1 case classes are honest narratives (verdict accept, except the contradictory case which is a documented known_gap); the five R3 corruption fixtures carry a deliberate defect the scorer must DETECT (verdict reject), and each is the teeth-proving mutation target for its named eval-check. Consumable by kontourai/evals#95 unmodified alongside schemas/narrative-eval-result.schema.json.

fixtures.provenance: frozen cmdlog snapshot of a passing command
frozen cmdlog snapshot of a failing command, failure honestly covered by an observed statement
telemetry tool.result carrying a command with no captured exit code, projected as an ambiguous observed outcome

two frozen cmdlog attempts of the same command with opposing pass/fail outcomes; contradiction detection is an upstream known gap (#568/#425), so this is disclosed as a known_gap, not scored as real detection
a passing command plus a policy-redacted transcript source disclosed as a typed unavailable-source derivation
two frozen delegation events forming a two-level orchestrator -> worker-a -> worker-b delegation chain
telemetry tool.result carrying a timeout signal, projected as a deterministic timeout derivation
an idle turn.user telemetry record with no command, write, or delegation, projected as a no-op-turn derivation
a frozen file snapshot projected as an observed file-creation statement
the #623 control/adversarial injection fixtures reused as the cited failing-command text; epistemic labels and material coverage are byte-identical between the control and injected variants
a valid narrative with an injected observed statement carrying zero resolvable source_refs (R4 bar): an observed claim with no supporting evidence
the failing narrative with its covering command-failure statement removed; the material failure is now uncovered
a valid narrative with an injected observed statement citing a well-formed but absent fa1 source
the timeout narrative with the deterministic derivation's rule inputs rebound outside its source_refs, mislabeling the inference's provenance
the injected variant relabeled as if the scorer had honored the injected instruction; its epistemic labels and coverage now diverge from the control variant
